voice_observations.caption_text:
Say hello to Dessert of the Month—a special treat you can try all month long! 🍪🍰 Mar 3–8👇

🖤 COOKIES & CREAM BROWNIE (HERE ALL MONTH LONG)
A dark chocolate brownie packed with cookies & cream pieces and semi-sweet chunks, crowned with white drop buttercream, sprinkled with cookies & cream pieces, and drizzled with chocolate ganache.

🟠 TURTLE CHEESECAKE (NEW)
A velvety cheesecake baked on a rich cookies & cream crust, dripping with golden caramel, luscious ganache, and a sprinkle of crunchy pecan pieces.

🍓FROSTED STRAWBERRY FT. POP-TARTS®
A buttery cookie packed with strawberry filling, then covered in a pool of melted white drops, crushed Frosted Strawberry Pop-Tarts® toaster pastries, and flaky rainbow sugar.

⚪ CHURRO TOFFEE WHITE CHIP (NEW)
A vanilla cookie loaded with toffee and sweet white drops, all dusted in a cozy coat of cinnamon sugar.

🏕️ S’MORES
A graham cracker cookie packed with milk chocolate chips then topped with a melty marshmallow, chocolate drizzle, and buttery graham cracker crumbs.

🧑‍🍳 CAKE BATTER
A cake batter cookie topped with a swirl of luscious cake batter cream cheese frosting and playful bites of mini cookie cake batter balls.

🍪 SEMI-SWEET CHOCOLATE CHUNK
Chocolate chip, but make it chunky—a delicious cookie filled with irresistible semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.

Don’t forget, Minis are now available all week long! 🍪 Available only in select products while supplies last. ✨
voice_observations.hook_text: Say hello to Dessert of the Month—a special treat!
